selections.name: Miracle Mark
selections.reason: Drops in class from AOC company and boasts a massive 113 speed figure which towers over this field. Should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Weaponized
selections.reason: Consistent presser who fits the class level perfectly. Figures of 104/102 make him a major player for the exactas.

selections.name: Mirage
selections.reason: Draws the rail and possesses tactical speed. Can save ground and factor into the exotics at a decent price.

selections.name: Sound Cause
selections.reason: Late runner who will benefit from the long Churchill stretch if the pace collapses.

danger_horse.name: Midway Munny
danger_horse.reason: Capable of running a big race on his best day and has back class.

selections.name: Mizzou
selections.reason: Linda Rice shipper with strong form and a class rating of 102. Looks primed for a top effort against this maiden claiming group.

selections.name: Stone County
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee drawing the rail. Has the speed to protect his position early.

selections.name: Scuffle
selections.reason: Solid recent form and fits the speed par for this level. A logical contender.

selections.name: Highway Patrol
selections.reason: Draws outside which is favorable in the chute. Can stalk and pounce.

danger_horse.name: Activity
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed ability and could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Belleza Latina
selections.reason: Has the benefit of experience with a solid 95 speed figure in her debut. That experience is golden in these short dashes.

selections.name: For The Win
selections.reason: First-time starter for a dangerous barn. Workouts suggest readiness.

selections.name: Countthetrue
selections.reason: Catalano firster drawing the rail. Must break sharp but has upside.

selections.name: Valentine Eve
selections.reason: Asmussen runner with a race under her belt. Should improve second time out.

danger_horse.name: Juneau
danger_horse.reason: McPeek firster who could be live at a price.

selections.name: Don't Say It
selections.reason: Standout on class and speed figures. Drops into a very winnable spot and should dominate.

selections.name: Talkin In Cursive
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 103 class rating. The main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Insightful Miss
selections.reason: Has the tactical speed to stay close and figures to be in the mix late.

selections.name: Ce La Vi Charli
selections.reason: Can pick up the pieces for the bottom of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Miranda's Rocky
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and capable of a minor award.

selections.name: Render Judgment
selections.reason: With three scratches, this race falls apart. He holds the best speed and class figures of the remaining runners.

selections.name: Pagode
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee who will be heavily bet. Main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Chillax
selections.reason: Draws the inside and has figures that make him competitive in this short field.

selections.name: House United
selections.reason: Completes the superfecta by default in a four-horse field.

selections.name: Smoke
selections.reason: Has the benefit of experience and a solid 93 speed figure. Outside draw is fine for this short sprint.

selections.name: Epic Fashionista
selections.reason: Casse firster who should be well-prepared for this debut.

selections.name: Smidgeon
selections.reason: Asmussen first-time starter. Must respect the connections.

selections.name: House Boat Party
selections.reason: Another well-meant firster who could factor.

danger_horse.name: Rumbelievable
danger_horse.reason: Wilkes firster drawing the far outside.

selections.name: Smiling Ellie
selections.reason: Boasts a massive 118 speed figure and excellent turf form. Should get a great ground-saving trip.

selections.name: She's Lookin Lucky
selections.reason: Very consistent and holds strong class lines. A major threat to win.

selections.name: Austere
selections.reason: Classy filly who will be saving ground from the rail. Cannot be ignored.

selections.name: For Love And Honor
selections.reason: Can close late for a piece of the exotics.

selections.name: Lunar Module
selections.reason: Strong speed figures and class ratings. Should sit a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Bernin Hot
selections.reason: Outside draw but possesses the speed to overcome it. Very dangerous.

selections.name: Systemic Change
selections.reason: Rail draw and consistent figures make him a logical exotics player.

selections.name: Honky Tonk Highway
selections.reason: Should save ground and has the class to compete here.

danger_horse.name: Ripped
danger_horse.reason: Asmussen runner who can pop at a price.

selections.name: Percy's Bar
selections.reason: Towers over this field on class (123). Should assert dominance in the stretch.

selections.name: La Rascasse
selections.reason: Strong class rating of 120 and solid speed figures. The clear second choice.

selections.name: Sneaky Good
selections.reason: Consistent runner who will be picking up the pieces late.

selections.name: Point Of Reference
selections.reason: Can hit the board if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Echo Lane
selections.reason: Huge 123 speed figure and proven stamina for this marathon distance.

selections.name: Burnham Square
selections.reason: The heavy favorite with massive class, but the distance is the great equalizer. Must use.

selections.name: Chapman's Peak
selections.reason: Solid turf pedigree and figures to get a good trip.

selections.name: Parchment Party
selections.reason: Can save ground and grind out a placing.

danger_horse.name: Clyde's Got A Gun
danger_horse.reason: Longshot with a big speed figure capability.

selections.name: Redhawk Riddler
selections.reason: Standout speed figure of 115 and class of 117. Should win this maiden event if she runs to her numbers.

selections.name: Epic Proud Mary
selections.reason: Solid figures and outside draw is fine here. Main threat.

selections.name: My Steel Magnolia
selections.reason: AE runner who is very dangerous if she draws in based on class.

selections.name: Winning Matters
selections.reason: Can hit the board with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Kaykay
danger_horse.reason: Baffert AE runner; automatic respect if she runs.
